input.command:
python3 -c "
import csv
with open('/lustre/fast/fast/sgoel/forecasting/current_sim/final_runs_v37/opencode_aljazeeraQ12026v37_qwen36plus/26-05-02-00-01-06/agents/minimalHarness_qwen_qwen36-plus_001/workspace/market.csv') as f:
    reader = csv.DictReader(f)
    rows = list(reader)

for r in rows:
    rd = r.get('resolution_date','').strip()
    if rd and rd == '2026-02-27':
        print(f'QID: {r[\"qid\"]}')
        print(f'Title: {r[\"title\"]}')
        print(f'Background: {r[\"background\"][:300] if r[\"background\"] else \"N/A\"}')
        print('---')
"

blocks.content:
QID: 209948
Title: What airspace will the airline say must safely reopen before normal flights can fully resume by March 16, 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-26. Because of regional fighting, some Gulf airlines tie the return of full service to safety decisions about closed airspace. Travelers are watching official advisories for the condition required before normal operations return.
---
QID: 434027
Title: Which city in Iran will public reporting by March 2026 identify as the site of a missile strike next to a boys' school?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-20. Regional military tensions can lead to missile incidents affecting civilian areas in Iran, including places near schools. This question asks which Iranian city will later be named in public reporting about one such strike.
---
QID: 333107
Title: Who will South Africa play in the first ICC Men's T20 World Cup semifinal on Wednesday, 4 March 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-18. The ICC Men's T20 World Cup is in its Super Eight stage, and the semifinal matchups will be fixed once the final qualification results are known. South Africa is among the teams still competing for knockout placement.
---
QID: 815035
Title: Which Iranian city will be reported as the site of an Israeli strike on an elementary girls' school that kills at least 51 people on February 28, 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-19. Tensions between Israel and Iran are high, and a wider conflict could lead to strikes on multiple Iranian cities, including civilian sites.
---
QID: 443306
Title: Where will Donald Trump say the final talks before the joint US-Israeli strikes had collapsed by the end of March 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-19. Diplomatic talks over Iran’s nuclear programme are continuing in international venues. If negotiations fail, later statements may identify the city where the last round broke down.
---
QID: 58660
Title: Which city will be reported as hearing multiple explosions during the strikes by February 28, 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-19. In a fast-moving regional military crisis, early reports may identify a particular city where explosions are heard. This question asks for that city as it will be named in initial authoritative coverage by the resolution date.
---
QID: 739634
Title: Which country will say by March 11, 2026 that it cannot participate in the 2026 FIFA World Cup?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-13. The 2026 FIFA World Cup is scheduled to be hosted by the United States, Mexico, and Canada. International conflict can affect whether qualified national teams take part in major sporting events.
---
